chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.752 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of main case For hearing of M.A. No.13309/2021 --------------------------------------------- 25.04.2025 Mr. Ishfaq Ahmed, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicant does not press the instant criminal miscellaneous application on the ground that learned trial Court has decided the case. In view of such position, instant criminal miscellaneous application has become infructuous, it is accordingly dismissed along with pending application(s). J U D G E Gulsher/PS
